jobs.title: Carpenter with a Van - Helsinki
jobs.meta_description: A carpenter needed for renovation sites in the capital region.
jobs.description: We are looking for a motivated and professional carpenter with a van for various renovation sites in the capital region. Competitive pay based on Finnish collective agreements, high quality tools, appropriate work clothes, multi-faceted tasks at different sites, existing occupational safety card, good Finnish language skills and team skills.
who_is_this_for: professionals with experience in carpentry and van work
jobs.search_keywords: carpenter, renovation site, capital region, Amiko Helsinki Oy

jobs.title: SPOTTELATES / STRUCTURAL COSTS To marry
jobs.meta_description: SPOTTELATES / STRUCTURAL COSTS To marry at Amiko Helsinki Oy in Karkkila. Explore this opportunity in Finland.
jobs.description: We are looking for SPOTTENEA / STRUCTURAL COSTS To the data center site in Vihti! As a Spotter, you are responsible for monitoring and controlling the movements of heavy machinery and vehicles on the site. You work in close cooperation with drivers and other site personnel, ensuring that everyone moves in a controlled and safe manner.
what_we_expect: understanding safe working distances and movements of heavy machinery
existing occupational safety card or readiness to perform it before work begins
good cooperation skills and responsible attitude
job_responsibilities: control and control of heavy machinery and vehicles in the site area
ensure occupational safety, for example, by warning workers and drivers about obstacles, people working in the vicinity or other potential risks
general safety and smooth traffic management in the site area
what_we_offer: competitive hours based on Finnish collective agreements
jobs.search_keywords: SPOTTENEA, structural costs, data center site, Vihti

jobs.title: Early Education Teacher, A Nursery in the Meadow
jobs.meta_description: Early Education Teacher, A Nursery in the Meadow at Espoon kaupunki. Explore this opportunity in Finland.
jobs.description: We are looking for an early-childhood teacher to join our small, warm-minded day care home that offers open interaction and a happy atmosphere. Located near Tapiola city centre, we provide support through a mentoring program.
job_responsibilities: teaching children aged between 1 and 5 in different groups
what_we_offer: mentoring program to familiarize with early education
who_is_this_for: English-speaking candidates interested in early childhood education
jobs.search_keywords: Early Education Teacher, A Nursery in the Meadow Espoon kaupunki Finland other

jobs.title: Traffic Controllers for Construction Sites in Pirkanmaa, Tampere and Surrounding Areas
jobs.company: Ramudden Oy Ab, Liikenteenohjaus Ja Tienpäällystys
jobs.description: We are looking for traffic controllers on several sites in Pirkanmaa! Ensure safe passage through construction sites as a team effort. Full-time position with asphalt wages.
what_we_expect: Normal senses: vision, hearing and ability to react
At least an AM121 or B driving licence
job_responsibilities: Ensure safe passage of traffic through the site as long as it is in place. Traffic control usually works in pairs and takes turns controlling traffic.
what_we_offer: A safe and professional work community
Variable sites and working days (seasonal work)
who_is_this_for: Traffic controllers with full age, normal senses, and at least an AM121 or B driving licence
jobs.search_keywords: traffic controller, construction site, Pirkanmaa, Tampere

jobs.title: Haemme PUTKITAITOISIA MAANRAKENTAJIA Espooseen
jobs.meta_description: Haemme PUTKITAITOISIA MAANRAKENTAJIA Espooseen at Amiko Helsinki Oy. Explore this opportunity in Finland.
jobs.description: We are looking for country builders to work at the Microsoft data center site in Espoo. Tasks include processing and transfer of building materials, earth-moving and soil-processing work with shovel, general cleanliness and order of the site, ensuring safety at work and managing transport arrangements.
what_we_expect: Experience in land construction or construction
Welding plastic tube, laser interest rates, welding competence
Occupational safety card or readiness to perform it before work begins
Good cooperation skills and responsible attitude
job_responsibilities: Tasks include processing and transfer of building materials, earth-moving and soil-processing work with shovel, general cleanliness and order of the site, ensuring safety at work and managing transport arrangements
what_we_offer: Competitive pay according to your experience (13,00 -17,00 €/ h)
Required work equipment (safety shoes, helmet, etc.)
Professional team support and fair employer
Work starts when suitable persons are found
jobs.search_keywords: country builder, Microsoft data center, Espoo, land construction, welding plastic tube
